name: terrains
description: Global Terrain Palette - Tactical Textures for World Painting.

templates.name: Cobblestone Road
templates.description: A well-maintained road of weathered gray cobblestones.

templates.name: Open Plains
templates.description: A vast, rolling expanse of hardy green wildgrass.

templates.name: Dense Forest
templates.description: The trees are thick here, their canopy blocking much of the sky.

templates.name: Rolling Hills
templates.description: Grassy mounds that offer a clear view of the surrounding lands.

templates.name: Mountain Side
templates.description: The terrain is rocky and steep, scaling up the mountain side.

templates.name: Mountain Peak
templates.description: The absolute summit. The air is thin and cold.

templates.name: Shallow Water
templates.description: Clear, knee-deep water rippling over a sandy bottom.

templates.name: Deep Water
templates.description: The water is dark and deep here, with a strong undercurrent.

templates.name: Sandy Beach
templates.description: Fine yellow sand dunes meeting the edge of the water.

templates.name: The Mire
templates.description: Damp, stinking mud and twisted roots choke the landscape.

templates.name: Wooden Bridge
templates.description: A sturdy wooden bridge spanning the gaps below.

templates.name: Arched Stone Bridge
templates.description: A grand arched bridge of weathered stone.
